patch.value:
## Agent need
Agents and maintainers must understand the rationale behind the system to avoid relitigating settled decisions or violating load-bearing invariants.

## Delivered surface (pm-m2u1)
50 Decision items forming a living ADR log; examples: literal all-src coverage (pm-w13j), remediation registry (pm-cc04), the 2026-06-07 deep-audit ADR (pm-96wm).

## Verified by
Decision items carry structured context/decision/consequence fields. Enduring value statement for the decision-log capability; new ADRs land under pm-m2u1.
As a future maintainer, I want every significant architectural decision recorded as an ADR with context, decision, and consequences, so that I can understand why the system is built the way it is

Decisions capture context + decision + consequences; the ADR log lives under pm-m2u1; superseded ADRs are linked to their successors; key invariants (coverage policy, changelog rules, reserved keys) are ADR-backed.
Delivered and maintained by pm-m2u1: 50 ADRs capturing context/decision/consequences as a living decision log.
A future maintainer understands why the system is built the way it is.
ADR living log with 50 decisions shipped and maintained.
Delivered and maintained by pm-m2u1: 50 ADRs capturing context/decision/consequences as a living decision log.
